description_long: This object is a life-sized model of a bird with a streamlined, elongated body and smooth, white plumage covering most of its surface. The bird has a slightly rounded head with a short, pale orange beak and subtle detailing around the eyes. Its wings are folded tightly against its body, blending seamlessly into the overall form, and the tail is straight and tapers gently at the end. The underside of the bird appears slightly darker, suggesting subtle shading or a faint grayish hue. The legs are not visible, indicating they are tucked beneath the body or not included in the model. The overall appearance is clean and minimalistic, with a focus on the bird's natural contours and feather arrangement.
description: A smooth, white bird with a streamlined body, pale orange beak, and subtle gray shading underneath. The wings are folded and the tail is straight and gently tapered.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's elongated body, folded wings, and straight tail, with the beak and head profile visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rounded back, symmetrical wings, and the straight, narrow tail tip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the same streamlined body and subtle shading on the underside.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the rounded head, short beak, and the smooth transition from head to body.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid white with faint gray shading on the underside
